impact: This gives the daemon and supervisor deterministic recovery instructions for the current failure pattern: repeated malformed Python expressions during public PDF fixture validation. The guide constrains the next retry to a small syntax-valid file set, fixture-first validation, and explicit anti-pattern checks before broader domain work resumes.
summary: Add a narrow supervisor repair guide and validation test for repeated PP&D syntax-preflight failures.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 4 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
